role: 4th President of Iran (1989–1997); Chairman of Expediency Discernment Council (1989–2017)
bio: Akbar Hashemi Rafsanjani was one of the most powerful figures in post-revolutionary Iran. He served as Speaker of the [Islamic Consultative Assembly](/orgs/islamic-consultative-assembly) from 1980 to 1989 and as president from 1989 to 1997. A cleric and confidant of [Khomeini](/people/ruhollah-khomeini), he is associated with the pragmatist wing of Iranian politics and championed post-war economic reconstruction. He chaired the [Expediency Discernment Council](/orgs/expediency-discernment-council) until his death in January 2017.
editorial_notes: Died 8 January 2017. First Speaker of the Islamic Consultative Assembly 1980–1989. Born Akbar Hashemi Bahramani.
